response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and ecosystems, with notable contributions to developer tooling and large-scale systems. However, his primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, D, and Node.js, with limited direct experience in Java/Kotlin/Spring enterprise tooling or IDE internals. His recent roles focus on full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure rather than JVM tooling or IDE development.
strengths: Strong background in building developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, test runners, CI/CD pipelines)
Experience with large-scale systems and micro-services architecture (handling millions of requests/second)
Proven ability to learn new languages and ecosystems quickly (e.g., Java/Kotlin, Spring if needed)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks (Spring, Quarkus) or JVM tooling
No visible contributions to IDE internals, language servers, or JVM-related projects in portfolio/GitHub
Recent career gap and lack of recent work in JVM-specific domains
